PROSE.Definition: ordinary writing that is not poetry

DEBATING SOCIETIES.Definition: groups where people met to discuss and argue ideas

PATRONS.Definition: rich people who gave support or money

BIG BREAK.Definition: the opportunity that led to success

FAR AND AWAY.Definition: clearly and by a large amount

PENSION.Definition: regular money paid after retirement or by the government

SUPERSTITION.Definition: a belief not based on reason or science

BIPOLAR DISORDER.Definition: a mental health condition that causes extreme changes in mood

CONVERSATIONALIST.Definition: someone who was very good at talking with people

NUANCE.Definition: a small difference in meaning or opinion

CHARITABLE.Definition: kind and willing to help others

BUNDLE OF CONTRADICTIONS.Definition: a person with many opposite qualities

WIT.Definition: a person noted for the ability to express himself intelligently in a playful or humorous manner

MAN ABOUT TOWN.Definition: a man who spends a lot of time socialising and going to events

VAIN.Definition: too proud of his looks or abilities

FLATTERING.Definition: giving praise or expressing admiration to make someone feel good

ELEPHANT IN THE ROOM.Definition: an obvious problem or issue that people avoid discussing

DEADPAN.Definition: showing no emotion while saying something funny or surprising

AUSPICIOUS.Definition: showing signs that something would go well

IMPROBABLE.Definition: unlikely to happen or be true

HANDICAP.Definition: something that made the situation more difficult

RIDICULED.Definition: laughed at or made fun of

INTENSITY.Definition: great strength of feeling or effort

UNDERCURRENT.Definition: a hidden feeling or idea that continued through the situation

PERENNIALLY.Definition: always or repeatedly over a long time

PATRIOTISM.Definition: love and support for his country

CAPITALISE ON.Definition: use the situation to gain profit

BLUEPRINT.Definition: a model or example that others followed

PROVOCATION.Definition: something said or done to make people react

BIGOTED.Definition: having unfair and strong negative opinions about certain groups

REVEAL CHARACTER.Definition: show what a person is really like

INTRUDED.Definition: entered people's private life without permission

INTRUSION.Definition: unwanted entry into his private life

FLASHES OF GENIUS.Definition: short moments of great intelligence or creativity

DISSOLUTE.Definition: lacking self-control, especially in drinking or sex

RARE GIFT.Definition: an unusual and valuable natural ability
